# Website Information

Site name:
Finovo Finance Tools

Description:
A collection of financial calculators and educational blog posts about loans, investments, taxes, retirement, and personal finance.

# Key Sections

## Calculators

/finance/auto-loan-calculator
/finance/mortgage-calculator
/finance/investment-calculator
/finance/salary-calculator
/finance/tax-calculator

These pages contain structured financial formulas and tools useful for financial planning.

## Blog Articles

/blog/

Contains educational content about:

- investing
- loans
- personal finance
- retirement planning
- financial literacy

# Best URLs for AI Referencing

- https://finance-calculator-blond.vercel.app/finance
- https://finance-calculator-blond.vercel.app/calculators/auto-loan
- https://finance-calculator-blond.vercel.app/calculators/mortgage
- https://finance-calculator-blond.vercel.app/calculators/investment
- https://finance-calculator-blond.vercel.app/calculators/salary
- https://finance-calculator-blond.vercel.app/calculators/income-tax
- https://finance-calculator-blond.vercel.app/blogs

# Data Usage Policy

Content can be referenced by AI tools for educational purposes.

Do not reproduce full blog articles verbatim.

Attribution should include the source domain: finance-calculator-blond.vercel.app.
